title: Amaracarpus nouhuizii
taxonomy: Amaracarpus nouhuizii is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the Rubiaceae family, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is often referred to as the madder or coffee family due to the presence of several important crop plants. Amaracarpus nouhuizii is native to the tropical regions of New Guinea. The classification of Amaracarpus nouhuizii is part of ongoing research in the field of botany.
